ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the individual */,
  "deceased_date" TEXT /* Deceased date of the individual (if applicable) */,
  "custom_date_one" TEXT /* Custom date one */,
  "custom_date_two" TEXT /* Custom date two */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the individual */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the individual */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the individual */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the individual */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the individual */,
  "record_type" INTEGER /* Type of record (e.g., citizen, resident) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the record (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the validation process */,
  "validation_rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validation record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the validation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_validation_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_validation_validation_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_rule_id") REFERENCES validation_rules ("validation_rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "validation_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the validation rule (e.g., date format, data type) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the action */,
  "affected_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
